description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on pull requests and pushes. The workflow has three jobs: tests, installer, and installer_test. The tests job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checks out the code, installs Nix, and runs nix-build. The installer job runs on ubuntu-latest if the event is a push, depends on the tests job, and prepares an installer. The installer_test job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest if the event is a push, depends on the installer job, and tests the installer.
